era: 2003-2009. Post-Hardcore. E=8 -- angular, shifting, dense, atmospheric. Capitol Hill. Suicide Squeeze.

theory_nodes.concept: Brian Cook carries Botch lineage directly into TAAS. Personnel continuity from mathcore (E=9) to post-hardcore (E=8). Not stylistic imitation -- genetic inheritance.
theory_nodes.description: The Botch → TAAS succession through Brian Cook.

theory_nodes.concept: Suicide Squeeze Records first engine appearance at 290. Founded 1996 David Dickenson, Capitol Hill. Early Modest Mouse, Hella, Aesop Rock. Eclectic, indie, serious.
E=8 as post-ceiling expansion. One step below E=9 maximum opens space for dynamics, texture, atmosphere. TAAS operates in this newly opened space relative to Botch.
theory_nodes.description: E=8 is not reduction from E=9 -- it is expansion.

cross_references.relationship: Genealogical source. Brian Cook moves from Botch to TAAS. E=9 to E=8. Tacoma to Capitol Hill. Mathcore to post-hardcore. Direct personnel succession.
E=8 holds. Punk/Grunge contrast. Seattle. Empty Records. Energy consistent, genre diverges.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8 + E=7 = E=15. Post-hardcore angular attack paired with raucous overlapping gull alarm screams. Both volatile, both abrupt, both multi-layered.
